strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a formal definition of 'uniform centered Gaussian first-order DML inference' before Stage 0: metric, index class, bootstrap approximation target, and whether logs are absorbed in J_n.
State the Conjecture 2 a*d_z=0 fixed-bandwidth case as a separate displayed corollary so the iff applies only to genuinely shrinking local reports.
Add one missed-adjacent citation in the proof-sketch discussion for nonparametric-rate DML with continuous/local targets, while making clear it lacks the Riesz critical-radius necessity frontier.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to Stage 0 with Conjectures 1--2 as the open flagship kernels and keep Theorem 2 explicitly conditional.
